summary: Certificate data bundle for OpenSSL in BLFS builds, derived from Mozilla NSS certdata.txt

integration.notes: Simple text data file; requires manual conversion for OpenSSL

alternatives.name: ca-certificates
alternatives.summary: Debian/Ubuntu package providing Mozilla-curated CA certificates for system trust store
alternatives.rationale: Higher integration and documentation scores; widely maintained by distros

summary: Supplementary root CA certificate data file used by BLFS for building system trust stores.

integration.notes: Simple text data file; easy to consume in scripts or make-ca builds

alternatives.name: ca-certificates
alternatives.summary: Mozilla-curated root CA certificate bundle used by most Linux distributions.

integration.notes: Native package in all major distros; drop-in replacement

alternatives.rationale: Higher integration and documentation scores; actively maintained by Mozilla with broad ecosystem adoption.

summary: Suite of tools for creating and burning optical discs (CD/DVD/BD) on Linux.

integration.notes: Standard CLI tools for ISO creation and burning

alternatives.name: xorriso
alternatives.summary: ISO 9660 Rock Ridge filesystem and optical disc image manipulation tool.
alternatives.rationale: Actively maintained GNU project with superior documentation, modern features and active ecosystem vs unmaintained cdrkit.

summary: Low-level C library for pixel manipulation, compositing and trapezoid rasterization used by X.Org, Cairo and others.

integration.notes: Widely used via pkg-config; stable ABI

summary: Command line tool and library for transferring data with URLs, supporting many protocols.

integration.notes: Native in virtually all OSes and languages

alternatives.name: wget
alternatives.summary: Non-interactive network downloader supporting HTTP, HTTPS, FTP and more.
alternatives.rationale: Strong reputation and recent release but far lower popularity and ecosystem activity than curl.
